Login.title: LumaWay
Login.subtitle: Sign in to manage your walkthroughs
Login.loginFailed: Login failed. Please check your credentials.

Profile.title: Profile
Profile.avatarDescription: Click on the avatar to upload a new image. JPG, PNG or WebP, max 5MB.
Profile.profileInfoDescription: Update your name and personal details.

Organization.title: Organization
Organization.myOrganizationsDescription: Create and manage the organizations you belong to.
Organization.createOrganizationDescription: An organization is your workspace for projects and team collaboration.
Organization.deleteOrganizationDescription: This will permanently delete "{name}" and all its data. This action cannot be undone.
Organization.leaveOrganizationDescription: You will lose access to all projects within "{name}". You can be re-invited later.
Organization.noOrganizationsDescription: Create your first organization to start managing projects and team members.
Organization.logoDescription: Click on the logo to upload a new image. JPG, PNG or WebP, max 5MB.
Organization.detailsDescription: Update your organization name and identifier.
Organization.name: Name
Organization.slugHelp: URL-friendly identifier. Only lowercase letters, numbers, and hyphens.
Organization.noOrganization: No organization associated with your account.
Organization.membersDescription: Manage who has access to your organization and their roles.
Organization.noMembersDescription: Members will appear here when users join your organization.
Organization.roleOwnerDesc: Full access. Can manage organization, members, and all projects.
Organization.roleAdminDesc: Can manage projects and invite members.
Organization.removeMemberDescription: Are you sure you want to remove {name} from this organization? They will lose access to all organization projects immediately.

Projects.title: Projects
Projects.errorLoadingDescription: Please check your connection and try again.
Projects.noProjectsMatchSearch: We couldn't find any projects matching "{search}"
Projects.getStarted: Get started by creating your first project above.

ProjectDetail.walkthroughsDescription: Manage and guide users through your application.
ProjectDetail.cannotCreateArchived: Cannot create walkthroughs for archived projects

ProjectActions.enterNewName: Enter a new name for your project.
ProjectActions.deleteConfirmDescription: This action cannot be undone. This will permanently delete the project {name} and all its data.

CreateProject.title: Create New Project
CreateProject.description: Create a new project to organize your walkthroughs and deployments.

NewProject.title: Create New Project
NewProject.description: Start a new journey with a fresh project.

Walkthroughs.errorLoadingDescription: Please check your connection and try again.
Walkthroughs.noWalkthroughsMatchSearch: We couldn't find any walkthroughs matching "{search}"
Walkthroughs.getStarted: Get started by creating your first walkthrough.

CreateWalkthrough.title: Create New Walkthrough
CreateWalkthrough.description: Give your walkthrough a clear title to get started. You can add steps in the next screen.

CreateWalkthroughModal.title: New Walkthrough
CreateWalkthroughModal.description: Create a new interactive guide for your users.
CreateWalkthroughModal.walkthroughTitlePlaceholder: e.g. Core Features Tour, Getting Started...
CreateWalkthroughModal.walkthroughTitleHelp: Give your walkthrough a clear title that users will see.

ApiKeyModal.title: Create API Key
ApiKeyModal.description: Generate a new API key to integrate Lumaway into your application.
ApiKeyModal.friendlyNameHelp: Optional: Give your key a name to identify it easily.
ApiKeyModal.keyGeneratedDescription: Copy it now. You won't be able to see this key again for security reasons.

ApiKeyDrawer.title: Manage API Keys
ApiKeyDrawer.listDescription: View and manage deployment keys for this project.
ApiKeyDrawer.createDescription: Generate a new API key for your application.
ApiKeyDrawer.editDescription: Update the identifier for this API key.
ApiKeyDrawer.successDescription: Your new API key is ready.
ApiKeyDrawer.friendlyNameHelp: Use a name that helps you remember where this key is used.
ApiKeyDrawer.keyGeneratedDescription: Copy it now. For security, you won't be able to see this key again.
ApiKeyDrawer.deleteApiKeyDescription: This action cannot be undone. Applications using this key will lose access immediately.

Editor.noStepsYet: No steps yet. Click + to add your first interaction.
Editor.stepStylingDescription: Configure how this step interacts with the user interface.
Editor.stepContentPlaceholder: Add content or instructions for this step...
Editor.noStepSelectedDescription: Select a step from the sidebar or add a new interaction flow to get started.
Editor.stepTitleRequired: All steps must have a title before saving.
Editor.failedToLoad: Failed to load walkthrough. Please check your connection.
Editor.walkthroughFlowDescription: Configure the navigation order between walkthroughs.
Editor.descriptionPlaceholder: Add a description for this walkthrough...

VersionHistory.title: Version History
VersionHistory.noVersionsDescription: Versions will be created automatically when saving changes
VersionHistory.restoreVersionDescription: This will replace the current content with the selected version

ForgotPassword.title: Reset your password
ForgotPassword.subtitle: Enter your email and we'll send you instructions to reset your password.
ForgotPassword.successDescription: We've sent password reset instructions to
ForgotPassword.checkSpam: If you don't see it, check your spam folder.
ForgotPassword.requestFailed: An error occurred processing your request

ResetPassword.title: Set a new password
ResetPassword.subtitle: Enter your new password below.
ResetPassword.passwordMinLength: Password must be at least 8 characters
ResetPassword.missingToken: No reset token found. Please use the link from your email.

ChangePassword.title: Change Password
ChangePassword.description: Update your account password. You'll need your current password to make changes.

Members.title: Team Members
Members.description: Manage who has access to this project.
Members.inviteDescription: Send an invitation to collaborate on this project.
Members.roleOwnerDesc: Full access. Can manage members and settings.
Members.noMembersDescription: Invite your team to start collaborating on this project together.
Members.removeMemberDescription: Are you sure you want to remove {name} from this project? They will lose access immediately.
Members.revokeInvitationDescription: Are you sure you want to revoke the invitation sent to {email}?
Members.alreadyMember: This user is already a member.
Members.alreadyInvited: An invitation has already been sent to this email.
Members.noPendingInvitationsDescription: No pending invitations right now. Invite someone to get started.

Notifications.title: Notifications
Notifications.emptyDescription: When you receive notifications they will appear here.

Settings.title: Settings
Settings.description: Manage your personal preferences and account settings.
Settings.appearanceDescription: Customize how LumaWay looks for you.
Settings.languageDescription: Select the display language for the interface.
Settings.generalDescription: Configure your default behaviors and display options.
Settings.defaultHomePageDescription: Choose which page loads when you sign in.
Settings.displayNamesDescription: How user names are shown throughout the app.
Settings.firstDayOfWeekDescription: Set the starting day for calendar views.
Settings.notificationsDescription: Control how and when you receive notifications.
Settings.emailNotificationsDescription: Receive updates and alerts via email.
Settings.notifyOnInvitationDescription: Get notified when you're invited to a project.
Settings.notifyOnMemberJoinDescription: Get notified when someone joins your project.
Settings.emailByActivityDescription: Choose which activity types trigger email notifications. These only apply when the master email toggle above is on.
Settings.emailOnMentionDescription: Receive an email when someone @mentions you in a comment.
Settings.emailOnReplyDescription: Receive an email when someone replies to your comment.
Settings.emailOnReactionDescription: Receive an email when someone reacts to your comment. Off by default to reduce noise.
Settings.emailOnCorrectionDescription: Receive an email when a correction is flagged on content you manage.
Settings.emailOnResolvedDescription: Receive an email when your correction is marked as resolved.
Settings.emailOnAnnouncementDescription: Receive an email when a team announcement is posted.
Settings.editorSidebarOpenDescription: Keep the steps panel visible when opening the editor.
Settings.defaultStepPlacementDescription: The default position for new walkthrough steps.

ProjectSettings.title: Project Settings
ProjectSettings.description: Configure permissions, security, and behavior for this project.
ProjectSettings.generalDescription: Basic project configuration and LumaWay delivery mode.
ProjectSettings.logoDescription: Upload a logo to visually identify this project across the platform.
ProjectSettings.clickLogoToReplace: Click the logo to replace it
ProjectSettings.projectDescriptionDesc: A brief description of what this project is about.
ProjectSettings.lumawayModeDesc: How walkthroughs are delivered to end-users.
ProjectSettings.assistantDescription: Configure the AI assistant and chatbot for this project.
ProjectSettings.assistantEnabledDesc: Allow the AI assistant to help end-users navigate walkthroughs.
ProjectSettings.assistantNameDesc: The display name shown to users when interacting with the assistant.
ProjectSettings.assistantWelcomeMessageDesc: The first message users see when the assistant opens.
ProjectSettings.assistantWelcomeMessagePlaceholder: Hi! How can I help you today?
ProjectSettings.chatbotEnabledDesc: Allow conversational chatbot interactions within walkthroughs.
ProjectSettings.securityDescription: Control access restrictions and security policies for this project.
ProjectSettings.requireApiKeyDesc: Require an API key to access walkthroughs programmatically.
ProjectSettings.allowPublicAccessDesc: Allow anyone with the link to view published walkthroughs.
ProjectSettings.allowedDomainsDesc: Restrict walkthrough embedding to specific domains (comma-separated).
ProjectSettings.ipWhitelistDesc: Restrict API access to specific IP addresses (comma-separated).
ProjectSettings.memberPermissionsDescription: Configure what each role can do within this project.
ProjectSettings.editorCanPublishDesc: Allow editors to publish walkthroughs without owner approval.
ProjectSettings.editorCanDeleteDesc: Allow editors to permanently delete walkthroughs.
ProjectSettings.editorCanInviteDesc: Allow editors to invite new members to this project.
ProjectSettings.viewerCanCommentDesc: Allow viewers to leave comments on walkthroughs.
ProjectSettings.viewerCanExportDesc: Allow viewers to export walkthrough content.
ProjectSettings.notificationsDescription: Configure which events trigger notifications for project members. Disabling a type prevents all members from receiving it.
ProjectSettings.notifyOnPublishDesc: Send a notification when a walkthrough is published.
ProjectSettings.notifyOnNewMemberDesc: Send a notification when a new member joins the project.
ProjectSettings.notifyOnWalkthroughUpdateDesc: Send a notification when a walkthrough is updated.
ProjectSettings.notifyOnMentionDesc: Notify members when they are @mentioned in a comment.
ProjectSettings.notifyOnReplyDesc: Notify members when someone replies to their comment.
ProjectSettings.notifyOnReactionDesc: Notify members when someone reacts to their comment.
ProjectSettings.notifyOnCorrectionDesc: Notify editors/owners when a correction is flagged.
ProjectSettings.notifyOnResolvedDesc: Notify members when their correction is marked as resolved.
ProjectSettings.notifyOnAnnouncementDesc: Notify all project members when an announcement is posted.

Onboarding.error: Something went wrong. Please try again.
Onboarding.welcomeSubtitle: LumaWay is a purpose-built system for creating interactive walkthroughs. Streamline onboarding, guides, and product tours.
Onboarding.themeSubtitle: Change your theme at any time via the command menu or settings.
Onboarding.workspaceSubtitle: Workspaces are shared environments where teams can work on projects and walkthroughs.
Onboarding.completedSubtitle: Go ahead and explore the app. When you're ready, create your first walkthrough from the dashboard.
Onboarding.featureWalkthroughsDesc: Build step-by-step interactive guides for your users.
Onboarding.featureTeamDesc: Collaborate with your team to create better experiences.
Onboarding.featureShortcutsDesc: Learn the keyboard commands by pressing ?.

Comments.title: Activity
Comments.noCommentsDescription: Start a conversation to collaborate with your team.
Comments.deleteConfirmDescription: This will hide the comment content. Replies will still be visible.
Comments.removeAttachmentConfirmDescription: The file "{fileName}" will be permanently removed from this comment. This action cannot be undone.

AdminUsers.title: Users Management
AdminUsers.description: Manage all platform users, their status, and role assignments.
AdminUsers.noUsersDescription: No users match your current filters.
AdminUsers.name: Name
AdminUsers.editUserDescription: Update user status and role assignments.

AdminRoles.title: Roles & Permissions
AdminRoles.description: Manage roles and their associated permissions.
AdminRoles.roleDescriptionPlaceholder: Brief description of this role's purpose
AdminRoles.noRolesDescription: Create your first role to start managing access control.
AdminRoles.deleteRoleDescription: This will remove the role "{name}" and revoke it from all assigned users. This action cannot be undone.
AdminRoles.permissionsDescription: Select which permissions this role should have. Changes are saved automatically.
AdminRoles.createRoleDescription: Define a new role for access control.

Invitation.title: You've been invited
Invitation.emailMismatch: This invitation was sent to a different email address. Please sign in with the correct account.
Invitation.loginRequired: You need to sign in to accept this invitation.
Invitation.alreadyMember: You're already a member of this project.

Actors.title: Actors
Actors.sectionDescription: Define the roles or personas from your host application. Actors determine which end-users can access specific walkthroughs.
Actors.createDescription: Define a new actor that represents a role in your host application.
Actors.name: Name
Actors.slugHelp: Machine-friendly identifier used by the SDK. Lowercase, hyphens only.
Actors.descriptionPlaceholder: Brief description of this actor's role in your application
Actors.noActorsDescription: Create actors to control which users in your host application can access specific walkthroughs.
Actors.deleteDescription: This will remove "{name}" and unassign it from all walkthroughs. This action cannot be undone.
Actors.assignActorsDescription: Select which actors (host roles) can access this walkthrough. If none are assigned, all users can access it.
Actors.noActorsAssigned: No actors assigned (visible to all users)
